metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: World Cup AI predictor now lets users ask daft what-ifs
AWS rolls the dice for faster, more efficient networking
NHS patients can't opt out of Palantir's data platform – but their hospital can
XP-era Windows spotted haunting London's driverless railway
crew_quote: "Well, I don't know about you lot, but I’d rather be in a nice 20.9°C curry coma than debating what-ifs with a computer that’s probably got less common sense than Rimmer!"
